name: Strawberry Shortcake (Bisquick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle strawberries with 2/3 cup sugar; let stand for 1 hour.
2. Preheat oven to 425°F.
3. Mix Bisquick, 3 tablespoons sugar, margarine or butter, and milk until a soft dough forms. Drop by rounded tablespoonfuls into 6 mounds on an ungreased cookie sheet. Sprinkle with additional sugar.
4. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Beat whipping cream in a chilled bowl until stiff.
6. Split shortcakes; spoon strawberries between halves and over the tops. Top with whipped cream.
High Altitude: Heat oven to 450°F. Decrease the 3 tablespoons sugar in the shortcakes to 1 tablespoon.
